name: Now It’s My Turn
original_name: ถึงตาฉัน รักเธอบ้าง
overview:
Fight (Meen), a confident soon to be CEO, once spent 3 years pursuing Napdao (Amee), who was scared of everything. Until one day Fight is exhausted and decides to stop loving. But when Fight retreats, Napdao realizes too late how deeply her heart is tied to her.

The problem is... Fight is no longer where she used to be.

From who used to run away, Napdao became who ran after to chase in the game of feelings, the roles have completely changed.

In this upside down love story, how will this love end? Will Napdao be able to love with all her heart and win back the one she let go?
